creator: alex-goncharov@comcast.net
text:
The state the PR is currently in ("feedback") is wrong:

========================================
From-To:	open->feedback 
By:	arved 
When:	Fri Jul 24 16:30:17 UTC 2009 
Why:	Maintainer promises to send another patch

---

From:	Alex Goncharov <alex-goncharov@comcast.net>
Date:	Fri, 24 Jul 2009 12:35:14 -0400
The correct patch follows (no changes in pkg-plist since last port
revision):

========================================

I.e. the corrected patch was submitted on the day the bug's state was
moved to "feedback".

Please commit the change -- by now another version of PostgreSQL ODBC
driver is available and we need to move on.

-- Alex -- alex-goncharov@comcast.net --
